name: Chili-Cheese Stuffed Chicken with Rice
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken thighs, skin and bones removed
4 ounces Colby/Jack cheese, cut into 1 ounce strips
1 jar (16 oz) Ortega Thick and Chunky Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin and bones from chicken thighs.
2. Insert one strip of cheese into each green chile.
3. Wrap a chicken thigh around each stuffed chili. Set aside.
4. In a 9-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add uncooked rice and green onions.
5. Stir until rice is light golden brown.
6. Add salsa, water, garlic, cumin, and cilantro. Mix well.
7. Transfer rice and salsa mixture to an 8-inch x 11-1/2 inch baking dish coated with non-stick cooking spray.
8. Cover dish with foil.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40-50 minutes or until rice absorbs moisture and chicken is cooked through.
10. Remove from oven. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
